scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws IllegalArgumentException for null child
appendChild(firstChild) creates childNodes list and adds the child with index 0
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is parent; parent.childNodes.size() == 1; child.siblingIndex == 0; child.parent() == parent
pseudocode: assert result == parent; assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0; assert child.parent() == parent;

scenarios.description: appendChild(secondChild) skips list creation and adds a second child with index 1
scenarios.precondition: parent.childNodes already initialized with one child
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 2; secondChild.siblingIndex == 1; siblings are in insertion order
pseudocode: assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1; assert parent.childNodes.get(0) == first; assert parent.childNodes.get(1) == second;

scenarios.description: appendChild(childWithParent) reparents node from its old parent to new parent
scenarios.expectedResult: child.parent() == newParent; oldParent.childNodeSize() decremented by 1; newParent.childNodeSize() incremented by 1
pseudocode: assert child.parent() == newParent; assert oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0; assert newParent.childNodeSize() == 1;
